reasoning: The PCI DSS control 1.3.2 focuses on ensuring that systems are not publicly accessible and that there are restrictions on inbound and outbound traffic. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to network security controls such as NetworkPolicies to deny ingress by default and restrict egress to the internet. Additionally, ensuring that services are not exposed unnecessarily as LoadBalancers and that Ingress resources have TLS enabled aligns with the control's intent to secure network traffic.
title: Requirement 1.3.2
